message:
test: deepen 5 shallow spec files to actually test their components (#9008)

- CardChat.spec.ts: replaces localStorage-only assertions with AI-mode
  propagation checks, per-card refresh affordance coverage, /api/ai/analyze
  contract assertions, and storage-event wiring. (#8995)
- Kubectl.spec.ts: rewrites dashboard smoke tests into kubectl-specific
  coverage — injects the kubectl card, asserts the command input placeholder,
  verifies disabled state when no cluster context is available, exercises
  keyboard-driven value updates, and probes the history search. (#8996)
- DrillDown.spec.ts: replaces the Escape-key page-stability check with a
  full modal contract — asserts drilldown-modal + drilldown-tabs + drilldown-close
  testids, non-empty content region, X-button dismissal, Escape dismissal,
  backdrop dismissal, breadcrumb navigation, and accessible close labelling. (#8999)
- CardSharing.spec.ts: drops duplicate navigation tests in favour of the
  actual sharing contract — POST /api/cards/save and /api/dashboards/save
  shareUrl formats, shared-card round-trip payload equality, 404 error body,
  dashboard export/import JSON schema, and deep-link page-mount guards. (#9000)
- AIRecommendations.spec.ts: verifies the recommendations panel actually
  renders in high AI mode, asserts at least one chip with non-empty title,
  opens the inline action menu and checks aria-expanded plus Add/Snooze/Dismiss
  affordances, and guards mode persistence across reloads. (#9001)

Fixes #8995, Fixes #8996, Fixes #8999, Fixes #9000, Fixes #9001

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
